topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that utilize voice commands through Amazon Alexa to control lighting and appliances, primarily focusing on turning devices on or off based on specific phrases.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa THEN Turn off using WeMo Lighting.
IF Item added to your Shopping List from Amazon Alexa THEN Turn on using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF Say a specific phrase from Amazon Alexa THEN Toggle on/off using WeMo Insight Switch.
